name: hormozi-scale
description: Operationalize Alex Hormozi's scaling framework — audit bottlenecks, build systems, hire correctly, and achieve 3:1 LTV:CAC before spending on paid growth. Apply the Scale Sequence (More → Better → New), Bottleneck Audit, Hiring Blueprint, and Automation Playbook to any service business, agency, or SaaS at $10k–$10M/month revenue.

commands.name: scale-audit
commands.description: Run a full scale readiness audit — bottleneck identification, LTV:CAC check, and prioritized action plan

commands.name: bottleneck-finder
commands.description: Identify the single constraint preventing the next growth stage and design the elimination plan

commands.name: hire-next
commands.description: Determine which role to hire next using the value-per-hour delegation framework

commands.name: build-systems
commands.description: Build an SOP and automation system for a repeatable process in the business

changelog.1.0.0: Initial release — Scale Sequence, Bottleneck Audit, LTV:CAC Framework, Hiring Blueprint, Systems Builder
